basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 246 Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Posts in Sangareddy District
basic_details.organization_name: Women Development and Child Welfare (WDCW) Department, Sangareddy District
basic_details.short_information: Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 notification has been released by the Women Development and Child Welfare (WDCW) Department, Sangareddy District, Government of Telangana, for 246 posts of Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Ayah. This is an Application Open stage recruitment, with online applications accepted from 06.07.2026 to 17.07.2026 (up to 5:00 PM), as per Notification No. 125/A/2026 dated 03.07.2026. This single notification covers two posts, Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Ayah, across five ICDS projects in Sangareddy district, and this article explains both in detail.

application_fee.details: The application fee is not mentioned in the notification. Candidates should check the official website for any applicable fee before submitting the online application.

qualification.details: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible women candidates only. Detailed nationality and residency requirements are not stated in the notification and should be checked on the official website. | Candidates should have passed Intermediate (10+2) as the minimum educational qualification for the post of Anganwadi Teacher.

salary_details.details: The notification does not mention the salary, honorarium, or pay scale for Anganwadi Teacher or Anganwadi Ayah posts. As per official notification, candidates should refer to wdcw.tg.nic.in for honorarium details.

selection_process: The selection process is not detailed in the notification. Candidates are advised to refer to wdcw.tg.nic.in for information on the selection procedure applicable to Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Ayah posts.
how_to_apply: Eligible women candidates can apply for Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 only through the online mode, between 06.07.2026 and 17.07.2026 (up to 5:00 PM).
Go through the eligibility criteria and other terms and conditions published on the website.
Fill in the online application form for the desired post, Anganwadi Teacher or Anganwadi Ayah, and the applicable ICDS project/Anganwadi Centre.
Submit the application online before the closing date and time.

Applications submitted at Praja Vani or directly at any government office will not be considered under this recruitment process. Only applications submitted through the official website will be accepted.
important_instructions: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Ayah posts. Anganwadi Ayah posts can be applied for only in tribal (Girijana) area Anganwadi Centres. Applications must be submitted online only through wdcw.tg.nic.in; no other mode will be accepted. The District Welfare Officer/District Collector, Sangareddy, has full authority to cancel, amend, or modify this notification at any stage. Applications submitted at Praja Vani or in any government office will not be taken into consideration. For further details, candidates should contact the respective ICDS Project Officer in Sangareddy district.

content_sections.heading: Quick Highlights
content_sections.text: Organization: Women Development and Child Welfare (WDCW) Department, Sangareddy District Post Name: Anganwadi Teacher (AWT), Anganwadi Ayah (AWH) Total Vacancies: 246 (92 AWT + 154 AWH) Apply Mode: Online Start Date: 06.07.2026 Last Date: 17.07.2026, 5:00 PM

content_sections.heading: Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Notification and Official Website
content_sections.text: The notification does not provide a direct downloadable PDF link. Candidates should refer to the official website below for the full eligibility criteria, terms and conditions, and the online application link. rows.details: Women Development and Child Welfare (WDCW) Department, Sangareddy District

content_sections.heading: Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: The notification states that the District Welfare Officer and District Collector, Sangareddy, hold full authority to cancel, amend, or modify this notification at any time. Candidates should keep checking wdcw.tg.nic.in for further updates.

content_sections.heading: Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The 246 vacancies are spread across five ICDS Projects in Sangareddy district. Anganwadi Teacher posts are open in all areas, while Anganwadi Ayah posts are reserved only for tribal (Girijana) areas. Anganwadi Ayah vacancies are available only in tribal/Girijana area Anganwadi Centres (AWCs), which is why Narayankhed project, with a high concentration of tribal thanda settlements, accounts for the largest share of Ayah posts. A detailed centre-wise (AWC-wise) list covering 243 Anganwadi Centres across all five projects, including the reserved category for each post (SC, ST, BC-A/B/C/D/E, EWS, or General/Open) and the application window of 06.07.2026 to 17.07.2026 for each centre, is available in the official annexure issued by the District Welfare Officer, Sangareddy.

content_sections.heading: Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible women candidates only. Detailed nationality and residency requirements are not stated in the notification and should be checked on the official website. Candidates should have passed Intermediate (10+2) as the minimum educational qualification for the post of Anganwadi Teacher.

content_sections.heading: Sangareddy Anganwadi Teacher and Ayah Salary / Honorarium
content_sections.text: The notification does not mention the salary, honorarium, or pay scale for Anganwadi Teacher or Anganwadi Ayah posts. As per official notification, candidates should refer to wdcw.tg.nic.in for honorarium details.

content_sections.heading: Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee is not mentioned in the notification. Candidates should check the official website for any applicable fee before submitting the online application.

content_sections.heading: Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process is not detailed in the notification. Candidates are advised to refer to wdcw.tg.nic.in for information on the selection procedure applicable to Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Ayah posts.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The list of documents required at the time of application or verification is not specified in the notification. Candidates should check the official website for the document checklist before applying.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible women candidates can apply for Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 only through the online mode, between 06.07.2026 and 17.07.2026 (up to 5:00 PM). Visit the official website wdcw.tg.nic.in . Go through the eligibility criteria and other terms and conditions published on the website. Fill in the online application form for the desired post, Anganwadi Teacher or Anganwadi Ayah, and the applicable ICDS project/Anganwadi Centre. Submit the application online before the closing date and time. Applications submitted at Praja Vani or directly at any government office will not be considered under this recruitment process. Only applications submitted through the official website will be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for Anganwadi Teacher and Anganwadi Ayah posts. Anganwadi Ayah posts can be applied for only in tribal (Girijana) area Anganwadi Centres. Applications must be submitted online only through wdcw.tg.nic.in; no other mode will be accepted. The District Welfare Officer/District Collector, Sangareddy, has full authority to cancel, amend, or modify this notification at any stage. Applications submitted at Praja Vani or in any government office will not be taken into consideration. For further details, candidates should contact the respective ICDS Project Officer in Sangareddy district.

faq.question: Q1. Has the Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 notification been released?
faq.answer: Yes, the Women Development and Child Welfare Department, Sangareddy District, released Notification No. 125/A/2026 on 03.07.2026 for 246 Anganwadi Teacher and Ayah posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes on 17.07.2026, up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. When does the Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 online application start?
faq.answer: Online applications open on 06.07.2026.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 246 total vacancies, comprising 92 Anganwadi Teacher posts and 154 Anganwadi Ayah posts across five ICDS projects.

faq.question: Q5. Which ICDS projects in Sangareddy district have Anganwadi vacancies?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in Jogipet, Narayankhed, Patancheru, Sadasivpet, and Zaheerabad ICDS projects.

faq.question: Q6. Can Anganwadi Ayah posts be applied for in all areas of Sangareddy district?
faq.answer: No, Anganwadi Ayah posts are open only in tribal (Girijana) area Anganwadi Centres, while Anganwadi Teacher posts are open in all areas.

faq.question: Q7. What is the educational qualification for Anganwadi Teacher and Ayah posts in Sangareddy?
faq.answer: Not Announced Yet. Candidates should check the eligibility criteria on wdcw.tg.nic.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Not Announced Yet. The notification directs candidates to the official website for age limit details.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an application fee for Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Not Announced Yet. The notification does not mention any application fee.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for Sangareddy Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible women candidates can apply online only through wdcw.tg.nic.in between 06.07.2026 and 17.07.2026. Applications submitted at Praja Vani or any office will not be considered.
